title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York and over $85M raised, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. This hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR in globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS and Fintech expertise align perfectly, cloud cost management (FinOps) is adjacent to RevOps core competencies, company scale ($85M+ raised, 100+ people) matches senior leadership capacity, and Tel Aviv/NY hybrid is ideal location.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of your background—scaling RevOps in high-growth B2B SaaS companies is exactly what caught my eye here. With your 15+ years of GTM expertise and track record driving operations through hypergrowth phases, you'd be walking into a company that's clearly built for scale (100+ people, $85M+ raised) and has real revenue momentum in the hot FinOps space. The role reports directly to the CRO and needs someone who can operationalize across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and global teams—and that's where your cross-functional leadership experience becomes invaluable.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in CRM systems. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS GTM models, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), proficiency with Salesforce, and experience with territory management tools. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with strong Salesforce expertise, analytical capabilities, and GTM optimization experience align perfectly with Gong's territory strategy mandate. This is a senior-level RevOps role at a scale-stage company that directly matches his core competencies and career trajectory.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS, including extensive work on territory modeling and sales operations optimization. Gong's focus on territory strategy and global scalability caught my attention because I've seen firsthand how the right territory architecture directly impacts pipeline predictability and rep productivity. I'd love to explore how I can help Gong refine its territory operations to support the next phase of growth.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: Warp, a fast-growing AI development company backed by Sequoia with 700k+ active developers, seeks its first Revenue Operations leader. The role works across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to make the funnel predictable and scalable—owning lead routing, scoring, SLAs, pipeline hygiene, and PQL scoring. Requires 4–8+ years at B2B SaaS orgs, ideally with PLG motion, hands-on CRM ownership, and strong cross-functional communication skills.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS expertise, RevOps/GTM focus, and hands-on CRM mastery directly align with Warp's need for a founding RevOps leader. AI-native GTM background, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional skills position him to scale a high-growth developer platform with PLG motion.
ai_opener: Warp is solving a critical workflow for developers at scale—700k+ active users is a signal that product-led growth is working. As your first RevOps hire, you'll own the infrastructure to turn that momentum into predictable, scalable revenue. With 15+ years building RevOps functions in high-growth B2B SaaS, Omri has scaled similar motions from chaos to predictability, combining PLG metrics (PQL, adoption velocity) with traditional pipeline rigor.

title: Senior RevOps Manager
description: LumApps, an enterprise employee-experience SaaS platform, seeks a Senior RevOps Manager to lead strategic initiatives aligned with the business plan, define and analyze commercial metrics across lifecycle stages, and partner with VP RevOps, CFO, and business leaders on the annual revenue model. Requires 6–10+ years in Revenue Operations, Strategy, or Analytics in SaaS, executive-level partnership experience, KPI frameworks and revenue modeling expertise, strong data capabilities (Excel/SQL/BI), and hands-on RevOps systems experience (Salesforce, Clari, Planhat).
score_reason: Exceptional match for Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, executive partnership background, and deep systems knowledge (Salesforce, revenue modeling, KPI frameworks). Remote Texas role aligns perfectly with his location flexibility and skill set in strategic revenue operations and commercial metrics definition.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across LumApps' Senior RevOps Manager role and was impressed by your focus on strategic revenue modeling and cross-functional leadership. With 15+ years scaling RevOps functions in B2B SaaS—including hands-on Salesforce administration, revenue forecasting, and executive-level partnership with CFOs and business leaders—I've built the exact frameworks and metrics architectures you're looking for. I'd welcome exploring how my experience driving commercial strategy and operational excellence could accelerate LumApps' revenue trajectory.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, is scaling rapidly and seeks a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations to make the GTM team highly effective. The role replaces manual workflows and spreadsheets with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—including lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer title, AI-native tools, and automation focus that matches Omri's RevOps expertise. However, the role's emphasis on coding/shipping may exceed typical RevOps executive scope—better suited if Omri leads technical RevOps teams or has hands-on automation background.
ai_opener: Conveo's approach to replacing manual GTM workflows with AI-powered automations resonates deeply—I've spent 15+ years building these exact systems (lead scoring, attribution, onboarding pipelines) at scale in B2B SaaS. Your tech stack and rapid growth with enterprise clients like Unilever remind me of the infrastructure challenges I've solved by bridging RevOps strategy with technical execution. I'd love to explore how my GTM operations background could accelerate your team's ability to ship.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Redwood Software, a SaaS-based composable automation platform for ERP, seeks a GTM Engineer to lead design, implementation, and optimization of AI-driven tools, automations, and processes across marketing. Requires 5+ years in marketing operations, marketing technology, or demand gen with B2B GTM understanding, Python and JavaScript proficiency for automation and API integrations, familiarity with SQL/JSON/ETL pipelines, and experience with automation frameworks like Make.com or Airflow.
score_reason: Strong alignment on GTM Engineer role, B2B SaaS, and AI-driven automation focus. Primary gap: requires hands-on Python/JavaScript coding and ETL pipeline expertise, which may be outside typical RevOps executive depth, though the strategic GTM optimization aligns perfectly with Omri's background.
ai_opener: Omri here – your GTM Engineer role caught my attention because building AI-driven automation frameworks across the revenue stack is exactly where I've spent the last 15 years optimizing pipeline and demand gen workflows. At my last role, I built similar composable automation stacks integrating marketing ops with sales processes – curious whether you're looking for someone who can architect the strategy alongside the technical implementation, or if hands-on Python/JavaScript development is a hard requirement.

title: Head of Marketing
description: Numeral, a venture-backed SaaS startup building a modern operating system for accounting teams, seeks its first GTM/Head of Marketing hire to develop and execute the overall marketing strategy. Ownership areas include branding, demand generation, sales collateral, thought leadership content, website design, press releases, and social media. The high-visibility role reports directly to the CEO and suits someone wanting to build a B2B SaaS marketing function from the ground up in a fast-paced startup.
score_reason: Strong GTM pedigree and B2B SaaS expertise align well with building a marketing function from scratch, but the role is primarily marketing-focused rather than RevOps/Revenue Operations, which is Omri's core strength. Better suited as a strategic advisor to marketing than as the primary Head of Marketing.
ai_opener: Numeral's timing is interesting—you're building the modern operating system for accounting teams right as finance tech is consolidating around AI-native platforms. Omri has spent 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM motions from zero, and while his DNA is RevOps and pipeline architecture, he's consistently been the person CEO's call when demand generation, sales enablement, and go-to-market strategy need to work as one machine. Worth a conversation about whether you need a traditional CMO or someone who can architect the entire GTM operating system.

score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps/GTM analytics expertise and SaaS background, though the role leans more marketing analytics/data engineering than pure revenue operations. Healthcare SaaS is adjacent to Omri's core B2B fintech/AI-native experience, and remote US location works well.

title: Marketing Technology Manager
description: WM Technology, provider of the Weedmaps B2C platform and WM Business cloud-based SaaS for cannabis retailers, seeks a Marketing Technology Manager to establish, leverage, and extend the martech environment for B2C and B2B customer acquisition and conversion.
